---
title: "LOGIT_LINK"
generated: true
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:LOGIT_LINK -->
```python
LOGIT_LINK = Link(name='logit', link=_logit, linkinv=_expit, mu_eta=_binomial_mu_eta)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:LOGIT_LINK -->
*TODO: describe this type alias / constant.*
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
